case_title: CUI QI LIU VS. GARNET NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AKA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIU, CUI QI AS TO DEFENDANT GARNET NETWORK INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, AKA G.N.T. INC. AND TEAMSHOP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
